zh.lifeSummary: 當Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond於1450年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 費馬納格爾康納爾時，她的父親King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien27歲，母親Annabelle de Burke20歲。她於1464年與King Hugh Roe O'Donnell在愛爾蘭庫迪 費馬納格爾康納爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond于1450年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 費馬納格爾康納爾时，她的父亲King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien27岁，母亲Annabelle de Burke20岁。她于1464年与King Hugh Roe O'Donnell在爱尔兰庫迪 費馬納格爾康納爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ni
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Pei-Lin, Kong, Min, Ming, Yung, Bin, Cao, Huang, Jing, Wen, Zhen, Biao, Chang, Chi, Quan, Yaping.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 倪, meaning ‘boundary’ or ‘infants’ in ancient Chinese: adopted in order to escape from a feud in place of the Chinese surname 郳, which is also pronounced Ni. The original surname was from Ni (郳), the name of an ancient state, also called Little Zhu (located in Shandong province), granted to the son of Duke Wu of Zhu (ruler of the state of Zhu, died 796  BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 賴, see   Lai   1.

variants.name: Lai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ching, Kwok, Ming, Wing, Wai, Wen, Chi, Chun, Ho, Kam, Man, Yee.  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Tuan, Hoa, Ky, Lan, Thang, Tien, Trang, Tu, Yen, Anh.

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 賴, meaning ‘depend on’ in Chinese: from Lai (賴), the name of a state (located in Henan province), which was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 來, meaning ‘to come’ in Chinese: (i) simplified form of the placename Lai (郲), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) adopted in place of the Chinese surname Lai (萊) which originated from the name of a fief/state. After its annihilation by the state of Qi, people simplified the name as 萊 in order to escape from political persecutions.

variants.name: Ny
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or soldier's name from ny ‘new’. It may sometimes derive from a placename beginning with Ny-.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 倪 (see   Ni  ) or 聶 (see   Nie   2).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Fionnghuala
meanings:
Irish: An old Irish female name signifying from ' fair-shouldered woman,' from fionn white, guala 
shoulders. According to the Annals of Ireland it has been Anglicised to Penelope.

en.lifeSummary: When Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond was born in 1450, in Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Ireland, her father, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, was 27 and her mother, Annabelle de Burke, was 20. She married King Hugh Roe O'Donnell in 1464, in Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1528, in County Donegal, Ireland, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond est née en 1450, à Tirconnell, County Fermànagh, Irlande, son père, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Annabelle de Burke, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé King Hugh Roe O'Donnell en 1464, à Tirconnell, County Fermànagh, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1528, à County Donegal, Irlande, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond 1450 in Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien 27 und ihre Mutter Annabelle de Burke 20. Sie hat 1464 in Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irland King Hugh Roe O'Donnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1528 im Alter von 78 Jahren in County Donegal, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond è nata il nel 1450 nel Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda, sua padre, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Annabelle de Burke, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato King Hugh Roe O'Donnell nel 1464, nel Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1528, nel County Donegal, Irlanda, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Ennis, County Clare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニス
ja.Donegal Castle, Tyrconnell, County Doneg: アイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルドンエガル カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomondが1450年にアイルランドコウントイ フエルマナグティルコネルで生まれた時，父King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brienは27歳，母Annabelle de Burkeは20歳であった。1464年にアイルランドコウントイ フエルマナグティルコネルでKing Hugh Roe O'Donnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1528年にアイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond(이)가 1450년 아일랜드 카운티 퍼먼아그h 티르콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabelle de Burke(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1464년 아일랜드 카운티 퍼먼아그h 티르콘에서 King Hugh Roe O'Donnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond nasceu em 1450, em Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda, seu pai, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Annabelle de Burke, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com King Hugh Roe O'Donnell em 1464, em Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1528, em County Donegal, Irlanda, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond родилась в 1450 г. в местности тирконнелл, коунти фирманаг, Ирландия, её отцу по имени King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabelle de Burke, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Hugh Roe O'Donnell в 1464 г. в местности тирконнелл, коунти фирманаг, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1528 г. в местности коунти доунегаль, Ирландия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond nació en 1450, en Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda, su papá, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Annabelle de Burke, tenía 20 años. Se casó con King Hugh Roe O'Donnell en 1464, en Tirconnell, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1528, en County Donegal, Irlanda, a la edad de 78 años.
